place: Layan, Cherng Talay, Thalang District, Phuket, Thailand
title: Hillside Sea-View Villa Collection with Private Pools
blurb: An exclusive collection of hillside villas above Layan Beach on Phuket’s north-west coast, each framing panoramic sea views from a private infinity pool. Three- to six-bedroom homes of contemporary design — white forms, warm timber and walls of glass — with options for a private gym and cinema room. A strong rental investment with a projected 8–14% yield. From ฿71,000,000 (entry villa has a valley outlook; sea-view villas priced above).
detail:
A boutique collection of luxury sea-view villas set into a hillside above Layan Beach, on the prestigious north-west coast of Phuket. Each home is oriented to the panorama — the Andaman Sea framed through floor-to-ceiling glass and from a private infinity pool of 13 to 16 metres — in a contemporary architecture of crisp white planes, warm timber ceilings and natural stone.

The villas range from three to six bedrooms across roughly 830–1,440 m² of built area on plots of 660–1,340 m², with open-plan living and dining flowing to the pool terrace, designer kitchens and bathrooms, and options for a private gym and cinema room in the larger homes. Layan is one of Phuket’s most sought-after enclaves — a quiet, green setting minutes from Layan and Bang Tao beaches, Laguna’s golf and the island’s best dining.

A strong investment as well as a home: the developer projects a rental yield of roughly 8–14%. Several villas are under construction with completion through 2026, while a completed, fully-furnished three-plus-one-bedroom show villa with panoramic sea views is available now at ฿120,000,000. Other villas start from ฿71,000,000 — note that the entry-priced villa has a valley outlook rather than a sea view, while the sea-view villas are priced above. Offered freehold or leasehold.

Current price list — special pricing valid 6 July to 31 August 2026:
Villa 2 · Sea view · 4–5 bedrooms · 680 m² — ฿78,000,000
Villa 3 · Sea view · 4–5 bedrooms · 680 m² — ฿85,000,000
Villa 6 · Sea view · 4–6 bedrooms (gym & cinema option) · 1,242 m² — ฿115,000,000
Villa 7 · Sea view · 3+1 bedrooms · 921 m², completed & fully furnished — ฿120,000,000
Villa 9 · Sea view · 4 bedrooms · 832 m² — ฿83,000,000
Villa 10 · Sea / valley view · 3–4 bedrooms · 855 m² — ฿78,000,000
Villa 11 · Valley view · 3–4 bedrooms · 855 m² — ฿71,000,000
Villa 1 · Sea view · 4–6 bedrooms (gym & cinema option) · 1,437 m² — ฿115,000,000 (reserved)
Villa 8 · Sea view · 4 bedrooms · 897 m² — sold

Prices are for the completed villa and landscaping; furniture packages and land freehold/lease structuring are quoted separately (the show villa, Villa 7, is delivered fully furnished).
